case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. THE PHOEBUS COMPANY, INC

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT THE PHOEBUS COMPANY, INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE PHOEBUS COMPANY, INC $20,944.54 PRINCIPAL, $6,765.19 INTEREST, $8,377.78 TAX PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,087.51, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
